description: Far Seer calibration set 3, 2026-07-03 12:36-12:53 (WOS_BattleReports_FarSeerCalibration_3.pdf pages 2-8; page 1 = set 1 duplicate). Deterministic (no proc skills; T6/T7 troops both sides low-tier passives only). Hero experiments: Seo-yoon 'Rallying Beat' (all-troop Attack +5/10/15% at L1/2/3, tooltips verbatim) and Jassier 'Tactical Genius' L2 (+10% damage dealt all troops). Extraction via 7 parallel vision agents, arithmetic-identity verified.

Lv13 Giant Tapir.note: power arithmetic proves ALL groups Lv4.2 (11,230.8 predicted vs 11,234 observed on the 1,146-kill run; badges that read 4.1 are misprints/misreads)

battles.note: beast inf AND lancer groups wiped, marks eroded 226 - absorption chain
IDENTICAL replicate of 12:40:18 - determinism holds for 3-class armies
FULL WIPE (victory) - only lower bound usable; own injured 1
EQUALS Seo-yoon L2 (+10% attack) same config exactly

tooltips_verbatim.Rallying Beat L1: Seo-yoon beats the war drum to boost morale, increasing all Troops Attack by 5%.
tooltips_verbatim.Tactical Genius L2 (Jassier): Jasser's combination of courage and wisdom enriches the army, increasing damage dealt by 10% for all troops.

headline_findings: ATTACK ELASTICITY = 1.0 EXACTLY when own survival is unchanged: Seo-yoon +5/10/15% attack -> kills x1.048/x1.102/x1.153 (predicted x1.05/x1.10/x1.15; integer rounding).

ATTACK SKILL == DAMAGE DEALT SKILL per point: Jassier +10% DD gives 257, Seo-yoon +10% attack gives 257, same config. Cannot yet separate 'skill multiplies attack' from 'additive-with-panel + exponent 1.116' because the farm panel is small (12.1%) - needs a big-panel account A/B.
N-exponent again: Seo L2 Tapir ladder 1000/1200/1300/1500 -> 195/257/291/361: N^1.51-1.55. And 257/1.10 = 233.6 = exactly 177 x 1.2^1.525 - baselines and hero multipliers compose perfectly.
Determinism extends to 3-class armies (12:40:18 == 12:40:55 to the unit) and to hero configs (12:42:45 == 12:47:32).
Mixed-class output huge: 500I+200L+300M kills 1,466 vs 252 for 1000I (marks per-unit output ~14x infantry's).
Lv13 Tapir groups are ALL Lv4.2 (power arithmetic exact at 9.797/unit).
